name: Similarweb Digital Intelligence API
what_it_does: Similarweb Digital Intelligence REST API for website and app traffic analytics and competitive intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage website traffic estimation and audience analytics retrieval, handle competitive benchmarking and market share analysis, access organic and paid search keyword and traffic data, retrieve referral traffic source and channel analysis, manage industry and category traffic trend tracking, handle app engagement and downloads data for mobile intelligence, access e-commerce and conversion benchmark data, retrieve geographic traffic distribution and audience demographics, manage competitor analysis and traffic comparison workflows, and integrate digital intelligence data with market research, investment, and competitive strategy platforms.
use_cases: Benchmarking website traffic against competitors from strategy agents
Monitoring market share trends from competitive intelligence agents
Researching keyword and traffic opportunities from SEO agents
Analyzing acquisition targets from investment research agents
not_for: First-party analytics for own website (use GA4 or similar for own data)
Real-time web analytics without competitive intelligence context
Consumer apps without digital market intelligence requirements
best_when: An enterprise using Similarweb wants AI agents to automate competitive traffic benchmarking, market share analysis, keyword research, geographic audience analysis, and investment/strategy research.
avoid_when: ACCURACY LIMITATION: Similarweb traffic estimates are statistical models, not exact measurements — estimates can have ±20-30% margin for smaller sites. Automated decisions based on Similarweb data should treat data as directional, not precise. Very small websites have unreliable estimates due to limited panel data.

auth.notes: Similarweb uses API key authentication. Per-account token with subscription module access. Developer documentation at developers.similarweb.com. No native webhooks. Rate limits per subscription tier. Bulk export for large dataset downloads. Data available from 2015+ for historical analysis.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free API tier — paid plan required; limited free website lookups via web UI
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; traffic API, keyword API, and advanced analytics separately priced
pricing.notes: Tel Aviv, Israel / New York, New York. Founded 2007. NYSE: SMWB (2021 IPO). Digital intelligence market leader. $565M+ raised. 4,000+ enterprise customers. 100M+ websites tracked. Used by investment firms, consultancies, and enterprise strategy teams. Competes with SEMrush for digital marketing intelligence.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; varies by subscription tier; bulk export available

known_agent_gotchas: ACCURACY LIMITATION: Traffic estimates are statistical models with ±20-30% margin; use as directional signal, not precise measurement
Small site reliability — sites with <50K monthly visits have unreliable estimates; flag low-traffic sites in automation as low-confidence
Subscription module scoping — traffic API, keyword API, app API, etc. are separate modules; verify subscription covers required endpoints
Monthly data granularity — most endpoints return monthly data; daily granularity may have higher uncertainty
Historical depth varies — traffic data available from 2015+; some endpoints have shorter history windows
Bulk export for large datasets — API has per-call limits; use bulk export feature for large competitive datasets
agent_readiness.security_notes: Web intelligence data. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Website traffic and competitive digital data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Digital intelligence. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Website traffic and competitive data.
